'''Alpiett Gredge''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]], and an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] during the time of the Rebellion, Gredge was the commanding officer of the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Scourge (Victory I-class)|''Scourge'']] as of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], which patrolled space around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. Prior to this, he was the station master of [[Station 1B6/Green]], a [[Bavos-II heavy-duty military space platform|Bavos-II military space platform]] that was located in [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]], near the edge of the [[Ringali Nebula/Legends|Ringali Nebula]] and rimward of [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] and [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]].

==Sources==
